tools.name: list_projects
examples: What Stitch projects do I have?

tools.name: get_project_details
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific project
examples: Tell me details about my project 3677573127824787033

tools.name: list_screens
tools.description: Get all screens within a project
examples: Give me all the screens of project 3677573127824787033

tools.name: download_asset
tools.description: Download assets (images or HTML) from a screen

tools.name: generate_screen
tools.description: Generate new screens from text prompt
examples: Design a mobile app for people who love skiing in the Alps
Create a landing page for a podcast

tools.name: enhance_prompt
tools.description: Enhance a design prompt using AI
examples: Enhance this prompt: Design a landing page for a podcast
